fear.lesson: The entire world rejoiced with happiness with their desire fulfilled they were content.  All people were following the path of righteousness. There was no fear of sufferings or agonies, diseases or famine.
fear.application: Apply this scriptural insight to your present moment.

grief.lesson: When Rama had set out to Chitrakuta, king Dasaratha, stricken by the grief over the separation from his son and mourning over him departed to heavens.
grief.application: Apply this scriptural insight to your present moment.

loss.lesson: With the princes ahead of you, board the boat. Tread the safe path. Let there be no loss of time.
loss.application: Apply this scriptural insight to your present moment.

purpose.lesson: Valmiki, the master, having found both Kusa and Lava endowed with intellect and accomplished in the Vedas initiated them into the Ramayana composed by him for the purpose of nourishing the Vedas.
purpose.application: Apply this scriptural insight to your present moment.

loneliness.lesson: The Ramayana illuminates the path through loneliness.

anger.lesson: Who (among men) is selfrestrained? Who has conquered anger? Who is endowed with brilliance and free from envy? Who is that when excited to wrath even the devatas, are afraid of (let alone foes)?
anger.application: Apply this scriptural insight to your present moment.

confusion.lesson: O Heroic Rama all the asuras along with the rakshasas joined on one side. A violent and a dreadful battle which threw the three worlds in to a great confusion, ensued.
confusion.application: Apply this scriptural insight to your present moment.

failure.lesson: Alarmed at the yelling of Sugriva, the cows began to run in all directions, like the  women of noble pedigree who, with their brightness lost, run perplexed for failure of the king to protect their chastity.
failure.application: Apply this scriptural insight to your present moment.

discipline.lesson: Greatly surprised to see him, Valmiki, purified by austerities and disciplined in speech, immediately got up and with folded palms stood before him.
discipline.application: Apply this scriptural insight to your present moment.

hope.lesson: With Rama living in the wilderness and Sita crying, I do not hope to survive for long, indeed.
hope.application: Apply this scriptural insight to your present moment.
